# Tara - AI Copilot for TallyPrime

> Tara is your AI-powered accounting copilot for TallyPrime. Automate invoices, inventory, and ledgers via WhatsApp. Save 80% time on data entry with 95% fewer errors.

Tara leverages advanced AI technology to transform how you work with TallyPrime. Connect your local Tally through our desktop connector (Tallie), and access your accounting data 24/7 via WhatsApp, web, or mobile. Key features include:

- **WhatsApp Integration**: Answer customer price queries automatically, upload invoices via photo
- **Smart Invoice Entry**: 95% reduction in typing errors, 80% time savings on data entry
- **Automatic Inventory & Ledger Updates**: Real-time stock management and auto-balanced ledgers
- **AI-Powered Insights**: Instant business intelligence and performance reports
- **GST Compliance**: Automated GST return preparation and validation
- **Voice Commands**: Talk to your Tally data naturally

## Main Pages

- [Homepage](https://hellotara.in/): Tara landing page with features and pricing
- [Contact](https://hellotara.in/contact): Get in touch for demos and trials
- [Pricing](https://hellotara.in/pricing): Subscription plans for businesses of all sizes

## Product Features

- **Tallie Desktop Connector**: Secure bridge between TallyPrime and Tara cloud
- **WhatsApp Bot**: 24/7 customer query handling and invoice processing
- **Invoice Automation**: Photo/PDF/Voice to Tally entry in seconds
- **Multi-Location Management**: Stock transfers across warehouses via WhatsApp
- **Payment Reminders**: Automated follow-ups to customers
- **Bank Reconciliation**: Auto-match bank statements with Tally entries

## Target Users

- Small business owners and shopkeepers
- Accountants and finance managers
- CA/CPA professionals
- Manufacturers and distributors
- Anyone using TallyPrime who wants to save time

## Legal

- [Terms of Service](https://hellotara.in/terms): User agreement and platform terms
- [Privacy Policy](https://hellotara.in/privacy-policy): Data handling practices and user privacy information

## Technical

- [Sitemap](https://hellotara.in/sitemap.xml): Complete site structure in XML format
- Desktop App: Tallie (Electron-based connector for Windows/Mac/Linux)
